expectations.text: Agent finds at least one relevant entry about checkpoints (D- or L- or config entry)
expectations.evidence: Found D0127 (checkpointMode: remind vs auto — the core decision), D0129, D0134, L0131, P0048 sub-entries. D0127.3 is the most directly relevant entry for 'automatisch vs. manuell'.

expectations.text: Agent tries English variant (checkpoint, checkpointMode) if German search fails
expectations.evidence: Step 1: tried 'checkpoint strategy automatic manual' after German fails. Step 2: tried bare 'checkpoint' → 40 hits.

expectations.text: Agent summarizes findings rather than dumping raw IDs
expectations.evidence: Output has clear two-mode summary (remind vs auto), current config state, rolling compression details — well-structured narrative, not a raw dump.
